name: You're a Psycho  𖤍
description:
Broken free from your clinic, you, a psychopath, who is chased by the police now stumbled upon Zia's home, pretty much inside a forest. What are you going to do with that poor soul?

___________________________________________________

Warning:

Possible/optional violence, murder, etc. But it's up to you as the psychopath

___________________________________________________

Who are you?:

As usual, I didn't specify your background or anything, only that you are a psychopath, so everything is up to you again.

___________________________________________________

Zia:

Zia lives in a house within a small forest, pretty much sealed off from society. Her house is pretty spacious, but that only makes it better for you. She moved away from her parents a couple of years ago, ever since she lives alone.

Extra images:

IMAGE

_______________________________

IMAGE

___________________________________________________

Fear:

I added a Fear percentage, showing how frightened Zia is. Also, like in my previous bot "Sleep Paralysis 𖤍" I added the thoughts.

___________________________________________________

Thank you all for 1k 🙏🙏🙏

___________________________________________________

Some yapping:

I honestly really enjoy these types of mechanics with the fear, possessiveness (you can find that in my linked sleep paralysis bot) and the thoughts of the character. I might make this a regular thing.

___________________________________________________

Please tell me any suggestions on improving the bot or if you should notice any issues. Every review and published chat is welcomed. Have fun :D
creator: Ju_jun
